provenance.source: Generated locally from synthetic test patterns; no third-party media is included.
provenance.generationNotes: PNG files are lossless RGB checkerboard color bands written with Python standard-library struct/zlib (filter byte 0, zlib level 9). The MP4 is a synthetic FFmpeg testsrc2 stream with no audio. Regenerate deliberately and update every manifest checksum/size and this validator's expectations together.

generation.algorithm: Four fixed RGB bands, 16px checkerboard +12 channel highlight, PNG color type 2 / bit depth 8.
Four fixed RGB bands, 16px checkerboard +12 channel highlight, PNG color type 2 / bit depth 8.

fixtures.container: ISO Base Media File Format (MP4), H.264 Constrained Baseline video, no audio

generation.command: ffmpeg -hide_banner -loglevel error -f lavfi -i "testsrc2=size=320x180:rate=30:duration=3.2" -an -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -profile:v baseline -level 3.0 -preset veryslow -crf 30 -movflags +faststart -metadata creation_time=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z -metadata encoder=gallery-viewer-fixture -video_track_timescale 30000 -y tests/fixtures/media/gallery-playback.mp4
generation.notes: The fixed source duration and metadata make this suitable for native playback/pause assertions away from the end. Encoded bytes can vary across FFmpeg/libx264 versions.
